title: Predicting a historic storm earlier with WeatherNext
summary: WeatherNext is Google DeepMind's global weather forecasting AI model that successfully predicted Hurricane Melissa's intensity and track days in advance, enabling early evacuation warnings. The model demonstrated high-confidence predictions for a Category 5 hurricane's landfall in Jamaica in October 2025.
